title: Origins: Cannoneer
description: Shatter bones from afar and cruise through foes.
body:
**Requires the [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) for Minecraft 1.20.1**

**Note: You have to add the datapack manually to your world if you are intending to add it with the modrinth app.**

**Origin Impact: 1**

*Dominates the seven seas with a powerful cannon, delivering explosive firepower with deadly precision. Every shot is calculated and controlled, striking fear into enemies with both accuracy and force.*

# Powers

<details>
<summary>Fire in the Hull!</summary>

- Fire a cannonball that deals **7 damage** to anything in its path, **shattering bones** and **inflicting slowness**.  
- While airborne, this ability instead **propels you forward and upward**, allowing for a **rocket jump**.


</details>



<details>
<summary>Ammunition</summary>

- You have **three shots** before your cannon needs to reload, **slowing you down** as you prepare for the next blast.  
- *(Reloading takes 3 seconds and gives Slowness II)*

</details>




<details>
<summary>Frugal Metabolism</summary>

- A life at sea taught you to **ration every bite**, so your **hunger depletes slower** than others.

</details>


 

<details>
<summary>Backdraft</summary>

- If you're **caught in an explosion**, your cannon **misfires and explodes**, **damaging you** and **reducing your ammunition by one**.

</details>


 

<details>
<summary>Coverfire</summary>

- Sacrificing your defense for maximum firepower, you **have 2 less hearts** and **cannot use shields**. 

</details>
